steps.title: Isolate y to read off the slope of line h
Flip and negate for the perpendicular slope
steps.content: Perpendicular shortcut: negative reciprocal of $-\tfrac{9}{4}$ is $\tfrac{4}{9}$. Perpendicular slopes multiply to $-1$, and $(-\tfrac{9}{4})(\tfrac{4}{9})=-1$, confirming the slope. That matches Choice D — $\frac{4}{9}$.
